definitions.luteinized unruptured follicle: An ovarian follicle that has undergone luteinization following the mid-cycle LH surge but has failed to rupture and release the oocyte, resulting in progesterone secretion by the granulosa-lutein cells in the absence of ovulation.

unresolvable.label: luteinized unruptured follicle
unresolvable.reason: Input file assigned parent UBERON:0001272 ('innominate bone'), which is anatomically incorrect for this ovarian structure. The correct UBERON parent UBERON:0001305 ('ovarian follicle') was determined via OLS4 lookup and biological knowledge. The ASCTB-TEMP source IRI in def_xref documents the original unmapped provenance.
unresolvable.suggestion: Set is_a to UBERON:0001305 (ovarian follicle). No part_of relationship is appropriate here; this is a type of ovarian follicle defined by failure to rupture after luteinization.
